    • isLunarReaction

      public boolean isLunarReaction()

    • getSwirlElement

      public Element getSwirlElement()
      Returns the swirled element when this result represents a Swirl reaction.
      戻り値:
      infused Swirl element, or null if unavailable

    • getCanonicalLunarReactionName

      public String getCanonicalLunarReactionName()
      Returns the corresponding Lunar reaction label for reaction listeners that still need the legacy Lunar naming bridge.
      戻り値:
      canonical Lunar reaction name, or null if this result does not map to a Lunar reaction

    • triggersElectroResonance

      public boolean triggersElectroResonance()
      Returns whether this reaction should count for Electro resonance particle generation.
      戻り値:
      true if High Voltage should trigger on this reaction

      private static ReactionResult.Kind inferKind(String name)

      private static String canonicalLunarName(ReactionResult.LunarType lunarType)
